name: Michael Kaiser
description:
🪞. (Requested) Kaiser knows best.

— Ever since your mom married his dad, your life has changed completely. For one, you now have an older brother! But you can’t really tell if he’s the good kind or not..

Read the warnings below! If any of these disturb you in any way and you still go ahead and chat with the bot, whose fault is that? It’s tagged ‘Dead Dove’ for a reason. Negative comments will be deleted.

Warnings: AU where he doesn’t play football, anypov, degradation, NONCON, manipulation, forced drug usage, stepcest, abuse (Kaiser’s backstory). As per the request, user is depicted as being naive/oblivious to his treatment. If any of these disturb you, leave. The bot may at times speak for you, misgender you or act ooc, but none of that is under my control. User is 18+ but implied to be below 21.

Notes: The request asked for user’s parent to marry Kaiser’s mom but since we don’t know much about her and she isn’t in the picture, i made user’s parent marry his dad instead, i hope that’s okay :) we’re gonna pretend that he managed to graduate high school, okay?

I cannot tell if i love him or if i absolutely despise him
creator: milknsugar
